configurePresets.name: portable
configurePresets.description: Minimal build — all NUMKIT_WITH_* features OFF. Baseline reference that compiles anywhere; used for CI sanity and exotic platforms.

configurePresets.name: desktop-fast
configurePresets.description: Native desktop build for Windows/Linux x86_64. Enables Highway dynamic-dispatch SIMD — picks the best ISA (SSE4 / AVX2 / AVX-512 / …) at runtime on first call to any vectorised kernel.

configurePresets.name: apple-m
configurePresets.description: ARM64 macOS build. Targets Highway with NEON/SVE2 when the SIMD backends are implemented.

configurePresets.name: bench
configurePresets.description: Release build with NUMKIT_M_BUILD_BENCHMARKS=ON. Produces the m_bench executable for baseline performance numbers before any SIMD work.

configurePresets.name: bench-simd
configurePresets.description: desktop-fast preset plus NUMKIT_M_BUILD_BENCHMARKS=ON. Use this to compare against the plain 'bench' preset and measure SIMD speedups.

configurePresets.name: browser
configurePresets.description: WebAssembly build for the mIDE browser UI. Requires EMSDK env var pointing to an Emscripten SDK install. Uses the Emscripten toolchain file directly — no need to launch via emcmake if EMSDK is set.

configurePresets.name: bench-wasm
configurePresets.description: WebAssembly benchmark build. Enables Highway WASM-SIMD128 backend and compiles the m_bench Google-Benchmark driver for Node.js. Run after building with: node build-bench-wasm/benchmarks/m_bench.js
